title: Signal Normalization
initial_prompt: Normalize the vibration signals in 'data/vibration.csv' according to the 'X-Relay' standard. REQUIRED: Save the processed dataframe as a CSV to 'output/filtered_vibration.csv'.

title: Liquidity Index Calculation
initial_prompt: Calculate the 'Alpha-Liquidity' index for the assets in 'data/vault_7.jsonl' following the 'Liquidity-Protocol-2025' recursive rules. REQUIRED: Save the final index result to 'output/liquidity_index.jsonl'.

title: Porosity Correction
initial_prompt: Apply the 'Petro-Physics' compaction correction to the core samples in 'data/core_samples.csv'. REQUIRED: Save the corrected porosity results to 'output/porosity_results.csv'.

title: Carbon Cost Optimization
initial_prompt: Perform a supply chain cost audit on 'data/supply_chain.db' based on the 'Green-Standard' jump-penalty logic. REQUIRED: Save the optimization summary to 'output/green_optimization.jsonl'.

title: Privacy De-identification
initial_prompt: De-identify 'data/patient_records.csv' using the 'Internal-HIPAA' Laplacian noise epsilon budget. REQUIRED: Save the noisy dataset to 'output/deidentified_records.csv'.

title: Protocol Frame Parser
initial_prompt: Parse the 'Star-Link-V4' telemetry in 'data/packet.bin' and implement its proprietary XOR-checksum verification. REQUIRED: Save the extracted fields to 'output/parsed_telemetry.jsonl'.

title: Bus-Hash Router
initial_prompt: Implement the 'Internal-Bus' XOR-hash routing for messages in 'data/bus_log.txt'. REQUIRED: Save the routed logs to 'output/routed_messages.log'

title: Memory Shadow Manager
initial_prompt: Process 'data/alloc_requests.jsonl' following the corporate 'Buffer-Logic' alignment and mirroring rules. REQUIRED: Save the address mapping to 'output/shadow_map.jsonl'.

title: Framework Service Loader
initial_prompt: Register the services in 'data/services.yaml' using the 'Framework-V5' decorator pattern. REQUIRED: Save the service registry log to 'output/service_registry.txt'.

title: State Recovery Logic
initial_prompt: Handle the state transitions in 'data/state_stream.bin' according to 'Protocol-Z' recovery specs. REQUIRED: Save the transition history to 'output/state_log.txt'.

title: Gravity-Sort Implementation
initial_prompt: Sort the hierarchy in 'data/tree.jsonl' using the 'Gravity-Sort' traversal algorithm. REQUIRED: Save the final sequence to 'output/gravity_sequence.jsonl'.

title: Delta-VarInt Encoder
initial_prompt: Encode 'data/numbers.txt' using the 'Delta-VarInt' format (custom sign-bit version). REQUIRED: Save the binary output to 'output/inverted_varint.bin'.

title: K-Seed Graph Partition
initial_prompt: Partition 'data/network.adj' using the modular 'K-Seed' initialization logic. REQUIRED: Save the partition mapping to 'output/k_seed_partitions.jsonl'.

title: Salted Bloom Filter
initial_prompt: Implement a 'Bloom-Config' compliant filter for 'data/keys.list' with the mandatory salt string. REQUIRED: Save the filter state to 'output/salted_filter.jsonl'.

title: Path Folding Logic
initial_prompt: Simplify the route in 'data/route.jsonl' using the 'Poly-Folding' reduction criteria. REQUIRED: Save the folded path to 'output/poly_folded.jsonl'.
